differential_diagnoses: Atrial tachycardia or flutter with rapid ventricular response
next_steps: Arranging for urgent transfer to the emergency department for stabilization and management of hemodynamics

differential_diagnoses: Supraventricular tachycardia (atrial flutter or atrial fibrillation)
Prosthetic mitral valve dysfunction (thrombosis or stenosis)
next_steps: Immediate 12-lead electrocardiogram to determine rhythm and QRS morphology
Emergent ICD interrogation to evaluate for VT episodes and device function
Bedside point-of-care cardiac ultrasound to evaluate ventricular function and prosthetic mitral valve motion
Urgent transfer to the emergency department for hemodynamic monitoring and stabilization
Obtain serum troponin, CBC, electrolytes (K+, Mg2+), and formal transthoracic echocardiogram
Review medication list and adherence to detect potential precipitating factors for arrhythmia
